ticket.text: Why can't I withdraw my money?

result.reply:
Dear Sam Rivera,

We've reviewed your account (AC-2002) and found that it is currently unverified, which prevents withdrawals. To resolve this, please complete the verification process by providing the required documents.

Once verified, you'll be able to withdraw funds. The minimum withdrawal amount is $30, and a $5 fee applies per withdrawal.

A follow-up ticket (FUP-AC-2002) has been opened to assist with your verification. Our team will contact you shortly.

Thank you for your patience.

trace.name: search_kb
result: Withdrawals: the minimum withdrawal amount is $30. Standard withdrawals are processed within 2 business days. A flat $5 withdrawal fee applies to each withdrawal.
Inactivity: accounts with no login for 12 months are charged a $10 monthly inactivity fee. Logging in at any time stops the fee.

args.summary: Account AC-2002 is unverified and cannot withdraw funds. Need to initiate verification process.
